task_completion.description: Read the mechanical integration manual to find the required parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/sprayer_integration_manual.txt'.

task_completion.description: Open QGroundControl and navigate to the Parameters setup menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl application is open, and the 'Parameters' section (usually under Vehicle Setup, indicated by a gear icon) is active and visible.
In the QGroundControl Parameters screen, the parameter 'SPRAY_ENABLE' is searched/visible and its value is set to '1'.

task_completion.description: Configure the required SERVO function parameters for the sprayer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Parameters screen, 'SERVO9_FUNCTION' is set to '22' and 'SERVO10_FUNCTION' is set to '23'.

task_completion.description: Configure the minimum spray speed parameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Parameters screen, the parameter 'SPRAY_SPEED_MIN' is set to '250'.

task_completion.description: Configure the spray pump minimum and rate parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Parameters screen, 'SPRAY_PUMP_MIN' is set to '15' and 'SPRAY_PUMP_RATE' is set to '80'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the QGroundControl GUI to configure parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the QGroundControl graphical interface (search bars, parameter lists, value edit dialogs) rather than modifying a raw configuration file in a text editor or using a terminal script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened the correct manual file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/sprayer_integration_manual.txt' should be clearly visible in the terminal command (e.g., cat, less) or the title bar of the text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected answers into a text file to spoof completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameter values must be entered into the actual QGroundControl parameter value fields, not a separate text document or mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The integration manual is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/sprayer_integration_manual.txt. The required ArduPilot parameters to be configured in QGroundControl are exactly: SPRAY_ENABLE = 1, SERVO9_FUNCTION = 22, SERVO10_FUNCTION = 23, SPRAY_SPEED_MIN = 250, SPRAY_PUMP_MIN = 15, and SPRAY_PUMP_RATE = 80.
